programs.title: Paramedics
programs.desc: Bill rushes to a woman whose heart is racing out of control. While Laura gives a cyclist the all-clear, Aaron happily rides the man’s pushbike home. A stoic 70-yearold man who fell out of a tree with a chainsaw worries Ben and Georgia.

programs.title: Paramedics
programs.desc: Olivia and Sally become medical detectives as they examine a woman having a potential stroke. Paramedic Bill races to a man having seizures. The patient is going downhill fast and could lash out at the very people trying to save him.

programs.title: Paramedics
programs.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
